items.claim: Alessandro Costa has high activity, having fought three times in one year.
items.quote: He's already fought three times in the span of 1 year.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa possesses a dangerous submission game including armbars and rear-naked chokes.
items.quote: Costa has a dangerous sub game too. Armbar and rear naked choke both in his arsenal.

items.claim: Cody Durden has a poor recent record, losing four of his last five fights.
items.quote: Durden can grapple, but he's one and four of his last five

items.claim: Zac Reese has poor takedown defense and is susceptible to being controlled on the ground.
items.quote: Zac Reese has a decent sub game... He's coming off of that loss to Michel Pereira. They both gassed in that fight.

items.claim: Farid Basharat is a decision-heavy fighter with only one knockout win.
items.quote: Basharat's a bit of a decision merchant. He only has one win by KO.

items.claim: Ethan Ewing has shown significant improvement in his takedown defense.
items.quote: Five months later against Estevam, he showed drastic improvement, great takedown defense

items.claim: Damian Pena has a 100% finish rate.
Cesar Almeida is vulnerable to heavy wrestling, having been controlled for over 11 minutes in a recent fight.
items.quote: Almeida was controlled by Laizeck for over 11 minutes.

items.claim: Kan Wang has poor takedown defense, having been controlled for over 8 minutes in her last fight.
items.quote: Kan Wang's last fight against Eduarda Moura, she showed terrible levels of takedown defense. She was controlled for over 8 minutes and 6 seconds.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka is prone to getting hit and making fights closer than necessary.
items.quote: He can be technical, but he can be very open to getting hit and making his fights a lot closer than they need to be.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt is chinny and prone to being taken down.
items.quote: Cody can be very open to getting taken down. He's chinny
